A.evidence: Faithful prose, footnote preserved; equations rendered as LaTeX with all \tag numbers (1)-(7); consistent ### heading hierarchy; only nit is degree shown as \u25e6 ring instead of °.

B.evidence: Degree symbol corrupted to literal 'GLYPH' three times (0.087 GLYPH, 0.17 GLYPH); spurious 'Line chart' inserted before Fig 9; 'Rong Xiong1' missing superscript; equations correct LaTeX but lack equation numbers.

C.evidence: Clean faithful prose with curly quotes; equations as LaTeX with numbers and correct degree symbol $0.087^\circ$; headings present but inconsistent markup (plain '1 Introduction' without #).

D.evidence: All equations lost to '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->'; block-diagram box labels dumped mid-sentence ('Decision layer...Global vision from the original 360 lines') and plot axis numbers injected into prose, badly breaking reading order.
